title: James Arnold Taylor

'''James Arnold Taylor''' (born [[July 22]], [[1960s|1969]]) is an American voice actor. Considered an official "audio double" for [[Ewan McGregor]], he has vocally portrayed [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]] in both the 2D [[Star Wars: Clone Wars|''Clone Wars'']]<ref name="CW Chapter 1">{{CW|1}}</ref> animated micro-series and the 3D [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' animated film]] and [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|TV series]],<ref name="Clone Wars Film">[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' film]]</ref> as well as in several ''Star Wars'' video games. He has reprised his role as Obi-Wan Kenobi in ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''.

Taylor is also credited as voicing "group voice: bomber pilot" in the [[2012]] film [[Wikipedia:Red Tails|''Red Tails'']], executive-produced by [[George Lucas]].

Outside of ''Star Wars'', he came to prominence as the voices of Tidus from ''Final Fantasy X'' and Ratchet in the ''Ratchet & Clank'' series.
